name: cdk
description: Container Discovery Kit (Peass-ng's CDK). Automated container escape and cloud environment enumeration tool for compromised containers.

metadata.ai_description: CDK (Container Discovery Kit) is an automated container post-exploitation tool from the Peass-ng family. Upload and run it on a compromised container to assess the environment for escape vectors. It evaluates capabilities (CAP_SYS_ADMIN, CAP_DAC_READ_SEARCH, etc.), mounted Docker socket, cgroup escape, kernel exploits, cloud metadata service access, and more. The auto-evaluate mode checks all escape paths and reports exploitable vectors.
use_cases: Auto-assessing container environment for escape vectors
Checking privileged capabilities on a container
Detecting mounted Docker socket for escape
Testing for kernel exploits applicable to the container
limitations: Requires shell access inside a compromised container
Some escape techniques require specific capabilities
Output depends on the container's available binaries

parsing.extraction_hint: Extract exploitable container escape vectors, enabled dangerous capabilities, mounted Docker socket, accessible cloud metadata services, kernel exploit opportunities, and any privilege escalation paths

examples.description: Auto-evaluate container for all escape vectors
